info.title: divband Platform API
info.description: Initial backend API for user authentication and project lifecycle orchestration.

post.summary: Create an instant publish upload plan
post.description: Accepts a static file manifest, creates a pending version, and returns upload URLs. Anonymous responses include claimToken, claimUrl, and expiresAt; authenticated responses omit those fields unless anonymous is explicitly true.

anonymous.summary: Anonymous publish response with claim fields

authenticated.summary: Authenticated publish response without claim fields

get.description: Returns metadata for a live or pending publish slug. Expired anonymous publishes return an error.

put.description: Requires either an anonymous claimToken in the JSON body or authenticated bearer credentials for the owning account.

delete.description: Requires either an anonymous claimToken in the JSON body or authenticated bearer credentials for the owning account.

post.summary: Finalize an uploaded publish version
post.description: Marks the uploaded version as live for the publish slug.

post.summary: Claim an anonymous instant publish
post.description: Transfers ownership of an anonymous site to the authenticated account, clears anonymous expiry, and removes the stored claim-token hash.

post.summary: Register a user and create a login session
Log in a user and create a session
Link an optional OAuth/OIDC identity to the current user
Link a GitLab identity for generated repository access

get.summary: List organizations visible to the current user

post.summary: Create an organization/team

get.summary: List projects visible to the current user

post.summary: Create a project

put.summary: Add or update a project membership

post.summary: Create a project-scoped API token

201.description: API token created; token secret is returned once

post.summary: Create the GitLab repository for a project
Provision the Kubernetes namespace for a project
Attach the managed platform subdomain to a project
Add a custom domain and return DNS verification instructions
Verify DNS for a custom domain and request a certificate
Trigger a build and deployment
Report deployment lifecycle status from CI

put.summary: Report status for a specific deployment

post.summary: Create a rollback deployment to the previous healthy release

get.summary: View deployment logs for the project

put.summary: Create or update project environment variables

get.summary: List AI change requests for a project

post.summary: Create an AI change request
Attach redacted project context to an AI change request
Generate a patch proposal for a confirmed project context

200.description: Patch generated and waiting for user confirmation

post.summary: Create a GitLab branch after user confirmation
Open a GitLab merge request for AI-generated changes
Trigger CI for the AI merge request branch

put.summary: Report AI build and deployment readiness status

ttlSeconds.description: Optional anonymous expiration window, capped by the service.

viewer.description: Optional viewer/runtime hint for the generated site.

spaMode.description: Enables single-page-app fallback behavior for the publish.

anonymous.description: When true with bearer authentication, create a claimable anonymous publish instead of immediately assigning ownership to the caller.

claimToken.description: Required when updating an anonymous publish without bearer authentication.
Required when deleting an anonymous publish without bearer authentication.

expiresInSeconds.description: Seconds remaining for expiring anonymous publishes; for durable authenticated publishes this is the configured default window and is not an expiry.

claimToken.description: Anonymous-only token used to update or claim the publish.

claimUrl.description: Anonymous-only URL for transferring ownership to an authenticated account.

files.description: Project-scoped paths; parent traversal and .git paths are rejected.

confirmApply.description: Must be true to acknowledge the generated patch before branch creation.

deploymentReady.description: True only after CI has succeeded and deployment gates pass.

ApiToken.description: Token hash is never returned; the plaintext token is returned only once on creation.

accessToken.description: Stored hashed or in a secret manager; never returned.
